```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(MTS)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

select <- dplyr::select
```
```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.parquet"
FREQ       <- 52
ALPHA      <- 0.05

VAR_VARS <- c(
  "target_price",
  "api_energy_and_lubricants",
  "api_fertilisers_and_soil_improvers",
  "api_plant_protection_products",
  "api_fresh_fruit",
  "api_fresh_vegetables",
  "fuel_petrol_price",
  "fuel_diesel_price",
  "sppi_road_freight"
)

EXOG_VARS <- c("shock_2021q4_2023q1", "post_shock")

ORDERS_TO_TRY <- list(c(1, 0), c(1, 1), c(2, 1), c(1, 2))

calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}

make_stationary <- function(x, name, alpha = 0.05) {
  s <- x
  for (d in 0:2) {
    pval <- tryCatch(adf.test(s[!is.na(s)])$p.value, error = function(e) 1)
    if (pval < alpha) return(list(series = s, d = d))
    s <- c(NA, diff(s))
  }
  list(series = s, d = 2)
}

extract_aic_bic <- function(model_obj, n_obs, k, p, q) {
  sig <- model_obj$Sigma
  if (is.null(sig) || any(is.na(sig))) return(list(aic = NA, bic = NA))
  ll       <- -(n_obs / 2) * log(det(sig))
  n_params <- k^2 * (p + q) + k
  list(aic = -2 * ll + 2 * n_params,
       bic = -2 * ll + log(n_obs) * n_params)
}
```
```{r}
df <- arrow::read_parquet(INPUT_FILE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

if (!"target_was_missing" %in% names(df)) df$target_was_missing <- 0L

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
```
```{r}
all_results <- list()
best_models <- list()
all_preds   <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {
  sub <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)
  if (!"split" %in% names(sub)) next

  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train")
  test_df  <- sub %>% filter(split == "test")

  if (nrow(train_df) < 50 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  n_test   <- nrow(test_df)
  real_idx <- test_df$target_was_missing == 0

  avail_vars <- VAR_VARS[VAR_VARS %in% names(sub) &
                           sapply(VAR_VARS, function(v) sum(!is.na(train_df[[v]])) > 20)]
  if (!"target_price" %in% avail_vars) next
  avail_vars <- c("target_price", avail_vars[avail_vars != "target_price"])
  k          <- length(avail_vars)

  train_mat <- train_df %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(avail_vars)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), mean(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  d_orders   <- setNames(integer(k), avail_vars)
  train_stat <- train_mat

  for (v in avail_vars) {
    res             <- make_stationary(train_mat[[v]], v, ALPHA)
    train_stat[[v]] <- res$series
    d_orders[v]     <- res$d
  }

  train_stat <- train_stat %>% drop_na()
  if (nrow(train_stat) < 50) next

  order_results <- list()
  for (ord in ORDERS_TO_TRY) {
    p <- ord[1]; q <- ord[2]
    min_rows <- k * (p + q + 10)
    if (nrow(train_stat) < min_rows) next

    m <- tryCatch(
      suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(
        VARMA(as.matrix(train_stat), p = p, q = q, include.mean = TRUE)
      )),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(m)) next

    info <- extract_aic_bic(m, nrow(train_stat), k, p, q)
    label_ord <- paste0("VARMA(", p, ",", q, ")")
    order_results[[label_ord]] <- list(model = m, p = p, q = q, aic = info$aic, bic = info$bic)
  }

  if (length(order_results) == 0) next

  bic_vals   <- sapply(order_results, function(x) x$bic)
  best_name  <- names(which.min(bic_vals))
  best       <- order_results[[best_name]]
  best_p     <- best$p; best_q <- best$q
  model_best <- best$model

  pred_vals <- numeric(n_test)
  all_data  <- bind_rows(train_df, test_df) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(avail_vars, EXOG_VARS[EXOG_VARS %in% names(sub)]))) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), mean(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  for (i in seq_len(n_test)) {
    wf_train <- all_data[1:(nrow(train_df) + i - 1), avail_vars, drop = FALSE]

    wf_stat <- wf_train
    for (v in avail_vars)
      if (d_orders[v] > 0)
        for (dd in seq_len(d_orders[v])) wf_stat[[v]] <- c(NA, diff(wf_stat[[v]]))
    wf_stat <- drop_na(wf_stat)

    m <- tryCatch(
      suppressMessages(VARMA(as.matrix(wf_stat), p = best_p, q = best_q, include.mean = TRUE)),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(m)) { pred_vals[i] <- NA; next }

    fc <- tryCatch(VARMApred(m, h = 1, orig = 0), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fc)) { pred_vals[i] <- NA; next }

    pred_diff <- as.numeric(fc$pred)[1]

    if (d_orders["target_price"] == 2) {
      last_fd      <- diff(wf_train$target_price)
      last_fd      <- last_fd[length(last_fd)]
      pred_vals[i] <- wf_train$target_price[nrow(wf_train)] + last_fd + pred_diff
    } else if (d_orders["target_price"] == 1) {
      pred_vals[i] <- wf_train$target_price[nrow(wf_train)] + pred_diff
    } else {
      pred_vals[i] <- pred_diff
    }
  }

  actual <- test_df$target_price
  valid  <- !is.na(pred_vals) & !is.na(actual) & real_idx

  smape_val <- round(calc_smape(actual[valid], pred_vals[valid]), 4)

  all_results[[comm]] <- tibble(commodity = comm, model = best_name, sMAPE = smape_val)
  best_models[[comm]] <- model_best
  all_preds[[comm]]   <- tibble(date = test_df$date, actual = actual, pred = pred_vals)
}

results_df <- bind_rows(all_results)
```
```{r}
cat("\n", strrep("=", 60), "\n")
cat("  VARMA MODELS — sMAPE\n")
cat(strrep("=", 60), "\n")
print(results_df, n = Inf)
```
```{r}
cat("\n  Residual diagnostics for best VARMA models:\n\n")

for (comm in names(best_models)) {
  model_best <- best_models[[comm]]
  label      <- results_df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% pull(model)

  avail_vars  <- VAR_VARS[VAR_VARS %in% names(df)]
  avail_vars  <- c("target_price", avail_vars[avail_vars != "target_price"])
  tgt_idx     <- which(avail_vars == "target_price")

  resid_mat <- tryCatch(model_best$residuals, error = function(e) NULL)
  resid_target <- if (!is.null(resid_mat) && is.matrix(resid_mat) && ncol(resid_mat) >= tgt_idx) {
    resid_mat[, tgt_idx]
  } else {
    rep(NA_real_, 10)
  }
  resid_clean <- resid_target[!is.na(resid_target)]

  cat(strrep("-", 50), "\n")
  cat("  ", comm, "—", label, "\n")
  cat(strrep("-", 50), "\n")

  if (length(resid_clean) > 10) {
    lb <- Box.test(resid_clean, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")
    cat(sprintf("  Ljung-Box(10) p-value: %.4f %s\n", lb$p.value,
                ifelse(lb$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")))

    if (length(resid_clean) <= 5000) {
      nt <- shapiro.test(resid_clean)
      cat(sprintf("  Shapiro-Wilk p-value:  %.4f %s\n", nt$p.value,
                  ifelse(nt$p.value > ALPHA, "✓", "✗")))
    }
  } else {
    cat("  Insufficient residuals for diagnostics\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}
```
```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
plots <- list()

for (comm in names(all_preds)) {
  label     <- results_df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% pull(model)
  smape_val <- results_df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% pull(sMAPE)

  sub      <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)
  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train") %>% drop_na(target_price)

  cutoff     <- max(train_df$date) - 365 * 2
  train_plot <- train_df %>% filter(date >= cutoff)
  test_plot  <- all_preds[[comm]]

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = train_plot, aes(x = date, y = target_price),
              color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.7) +
    geom_line(data = test_plot, aes(x = date, y = actual, color = "Actual"),
              linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_line(data = test_plot, aes(x = date, y = pred, color = "Forecast"),
              linewidth = 0.9, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Actual" = "#2c3e50", "Forecast" = "#e74c3c"), name = NULL) +
    labs(title = comm,
         subtitle = sprintf("%s  |  sMAPE = %.2f", label, smape_val),
         x = NULL, y = "Price") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12), legend.position = "bottom")

  plots[[length(plots) + 1]] <- p
}

if (length(plots) > 0) {
  combined <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) +
    plot_annotation(title = "VARMA — Forecast vs Actual",
                    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14)))
  print(combined)
}
```
